def test_find_in_sorted_missing_greater_than_all():
    from source import find_in_sorted
    # This value is greater than every element, so it should return -1.
    # The buggy code recurses with binsearch(mid, end) instead of binsearch(mid+1, end),
    # causing infinite recursion when the target is not in the upper half.
    result = find_in_sorted([3, 4, 5, 6, 7], 8)
    assert result == -1, "Expected -1 for value not in array, but got %d" % result
